name: beebs-discord-alerts
description: Discord bot that monitors Beebs search/category pages and sends new listing alerts.

scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check src/client.js && node --check src/commands/index.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/database.js && node --check src/services/beebsWatcher.js && node --check src/services/scraper.js
